title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at L&T Infotech International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at L&T Infotech International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
L&T Infotech International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About L&T Infotech International Enterprises:
L&T Infotech International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Infotech International Enterprises!
